typeDescriptions.typeString: function (string memory,string memory) view external returns (string memory)

documentation.text: @dev Resolve private key from env var `PRIVATE_KEY`, falling back to interactive prompt
@dev Ensure the string has a 0x prefix (required by vm.parseUint for hex)

@title DeployNFToken
 @notice Deploy the NFToken contract with interactive or env-based key entry
